title: The Guilt of Janet Ames
writer: Louella MacFarlane, Allen Rivkin, Devery Freeman
actors: Rosalind Russell, Melvyn Douglas, Sid Caesar
plot: An obsessively bitter war widow and one of the men her husband saved in WW2 meet. He tries to convince her the sacrifice was necessary, but her problem isn't that simple. And can she help him with his wartime emotional scars he hi...
